reason: This is a general romantic/emotional quote in Arabic about personal relationships, stating that no matter how strong you are, there's always someone who can make you feel weak - not out of fear but due to their special place in your heart. Contains no ISIS-related content or extremist ideology.
original_post: مهما بلغت قوة شخصيتك هناك دائماً شخص يمكن أن يجعلك ضعيفاً أمامه، ليس ذل ولا خوف، إنما هي مكانة راقية في قلبك يستحقها !”💕
